channel.title: PhoneHowTo
channel.description: Model-specific how-tos for iPhone, Galaxy, Pixel, and Motorola. Screenshots, backups, battery drain, storage full, frozen screen, transfer to a new phone — no fluff, no 12-minute intro.

item.title: How to screenshot on iPhone 15 and iPhone 16 (every method)

item.description: Android storage full: what to delete first without losing photos

item.title: How to transfer data from Android to iPhone (Move to iOS walkthrough)
